title: Increased Pearl Cooldown
description: Changes the Ender Pearl cooldown to 6 seconds
body:
This simple datapack changes the Ender Pearl cooldown from 1 second to 6 seconds. This is useful in PVP scenarios to avoid people unloading a shulker of pearls to escape.

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aab4fea01eaa8ffad3e63670fdb95af1400762ba.gif)

**Only Works in 1.21.2 or above, due to usage of item components which was added then, so I can't backport it either.**

Report any bugs or issues in my discord.
